name: Pear Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 small Pears, peeled, cored, and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter an 8 x 5-inch loaf pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream together 6 tablespoons of the butter with the sugar and vanilla until light and smooth.
4. Sift together the flour, salt, baking powder, and nutmeg and mix until evenly combined.
5. Add half of the flour mixture and the egg to the butter mixture and mix well.
6. Add the remaining flour mixture and buttermilk, beating them in thoroughly.
7. Fold in the pears and pecans.
8. Scoop the batter into the prepared pan and bake for about 45 minutes, or until a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes, then turn out of the pan and finish cooling.
10. Invert onto a serving plate and cut into slices.
Yield: 1 (8-inch) loaf
